description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a single, upright trunk that tapers as it rises. The trunk is dark brown and textured, supporting a canopy of dense, green foliage. The branches radiate outward and upward, creating an irregular, somewhat asymmetrical crown. The leaves are broad and flat, forming clusters that obscure much of the inner branch structure. The base of the trunk flares slightly, and no visible roots extend above the ground. This tree would be commonly found lining urban streets, in parks, or as part of landscaped areas.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a dark, textured trunk and a dense canopy of broad green leaves.
description_view_0: The tree is seen at a slight angle, showing a dense cluster of leaves on the left and a visible, flared trunk base.
description_view_1: This view presents the tree more frontally, with the trunk and main branches clearly visible and the canopy appearing slightly more open.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from the opposite side, with the canopy leaning to the left and the trunk partially obscured by foliage.
description_view_3: A nearly straight-on view, highlighting the vertical trunk and a balanced, dense canopy with minimal gaps.
